title: techmap: incorrect lowering of $shift/$shiftx cells (lack of B_SIGNED check)
body:
```
$ cat t.v
module top(...);

input [15:-16] A;
input signed [5:0] B;
output [3:0] Y;

assign Y = A[B*4+:4];

endmodule
$ yosys -p "opt; eval -set A 32'h12345678 -set B 6'h20; techmap; eval -set A 32'h12345678 -set B 6'h20" t.v
[...]
3. Executing EVAL pass (evaluate the circuit given an input).
Eval result: \Y = 4'xxxx.

4. Executing TECHMAP pass (map to technology primitives).
[...]

5. Executing EVAL pass (evaluate the circuit given an input).
Eval result: \Y = 4'0100.
```
